name: path-to-academia
description: Agent plugin for finding PhD and postdoc supervisors, labs, and open academic positions.

interface.shortDescription: Help agents find academic supervisors, labs, and open positions.
interface.longDescription: path to academia helps agents ask intake questions, configure the search brief, collect current source evidence, verify identities, save auditable candidate tables, export CSV/XLSX files, and open a local Web UI for PhD/postdoc supervisor, lab, and position searches.
defaultPrompt: Use path-to-academia to find PhD or postdoc supervisors; ask intake questions before collecting sources.
Use path-to-academia to create a biology demo workspace and open the Web UI.
Audit my path to academia workspace and export a wrapped XLSX.
